scripts.build: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && prisma db seed && next build --turbopack
scripts.db:wait: docker compose exec -T db sh -c "until pg_isready -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432; do sleep 1; done"
scripts.db:pw: docker compose exec -T db psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'postgres';"
scripts.dev:stack: npm run db:up && prisma migrate deploy && npm run db:seed && next dev --turbopack
scripts.dev:all: npm run db:up && npm run db:wait && prisma migrate deploy && npm run db:seed && next dev --turbopack
